prompt: A cinematic luxury product advertisement shot of a vintage wooden turntable playing a translucent bright red vinyl record in a warm, dimly lit living room. Behind the turntable, an upright album cover dominates the frame with a bold distressed red background and large condensed cream-white block lettering reading {argument name="album title" default="BELLA CIAO"} at the upper left, with smaller black text beneath reading {argument name="subtitle text" default="SOUNDTRACK OF THE RESISTANCE"}. The cover art shows a dark black silhouette of a hooded figure centered against the red field, with a row of small marching figures along the bottom edge and faint architectural line art on the lower left, evoking political resistance and dramatic soundtrack imagery. The turntable is shown in three-quarter view on a wooden table, with a brushed metal platter rim, black tonearm resting on the record at the right, and a small metallic control knob visible at front left. Use a shallow depth of field, premium editorial lighting, rich amber highlights, soft candle glow in the background on the right, shelves and home interior details blurred in the background, and a high-end fashion-campaign-meets-music-product aesthetic. At the bottom of the image, add a bold promotional banner overlay with large white condensed all-caps text reading {argument name="bottom headline" default="SOUNDTRACK OF THE RESISTANCE"} and a centered red rectangular button underneath with white all-caps text reading {argument name="button text" default="SHOP NOW"}. Include a small white {argument name="brand watermark" default="Pollo.ai"} watermark in the top-right corner. Ultra-realistic photography, sharp focus on the vinyl and cover, moody luxurious atmosphere, social-media ad composition, vertical 2:3 format.
translatedPrompt: 一张极具电影质感的奢华产品广告摄影，画面中一台复古木质唱机正在播放一张半透明的亮红色黑胶唱片，场景设定在温暖且光线昏暗的客厅中。唱机后方，一张竖立的专辑封面占据了画面主体，背景为醒目的做旧红色，左上方印有巨大的奶油白色压缩字体 {argument name="album title" default="BELLA CIAO"}，下方配有较小的黑色文字 {argument name="subtitle text" default="SOUNDTRACK OF THE RESISTANCE"}。封面艺术展示了一个黑色连帽人物剪影，置于红色背景中央，底部边缘有一排细小的行进人物剪影，左下角有淡淡的建筑线条艺术，营造出政治抵抗与戏剧性原声带的意境。唱机以四分之三侧视图呈现于木桌上，带有拉丝金属唱盘边缘，黑色唱臂停在唱片右侧，左前方可见一个小型金属控制旋钮。采用浅景深、高级编辑摄影布光、丰富的琥珀色高光，右侧背景有柔和的烛光，背景中的书架和家居细节呈虚化状态，呈现出高端时尚广告与音乐产品结合的美学风格。在图像底部，添加一个醒目的促销横幅叠加层，上方印有巨大的白色压缩全大写文字 {argument name="bottom headline" default="SOUNDTRACK OF THE RESISTANCE"}，下方居中放置一个红色矩形按钮，内含白色全大写文字 {argument name="button text" default="SHOP NOW"}。在右上角包含一个小的白色 {argument name="brand watermark" default="Pollo.ai"} 水印。超写实摄影，黑胶唱片与封面焦点清晰，氛围沉郁奢华，社交媒体广告构图，竖版 2:3 比例。

breakdown.creativeCore: 红色黑胶原声带广告：一张用于红色黑胶原声带专辑的高级竖版广告图，非常适合音乐推广、电商创意素材及电影感社交媒体营销活动。
breakdown.subject: 空间
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, editorial, vintage, luxury, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: shallow depth, depth of field]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
